zh.lifeSummary: 當Henry Wardlaw於1410年出生在蘇格蘭費伏時，他的父親Henry Wardlaw11歲，母親Christian Lauder10歲。他與Margaret Oliphant co-heiress of Dron結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1475年7月14日在蘇格蘭享年65歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Henry Wardlaw于1410年出生在苏格兰費伏时，他的父亲Henry Wardlaw11岁，母亲Christian Lauder10岁。他与Margaret Oliphant co-heiress of Dron结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1475年7月14日在苏格兰享年65岁。

nameMeanings.name: Wardlaw
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: probably a habitational name from Wardlaw, in Kirkhill, Inverness, which is recorded as Wardelaue in 1202, or perhaps Wardlaw in Ayrs. However, the possibility that the Scottish family is related to the Wardlow family of Wardlow (Derbys) cannot be ruled out. The placenames derive from Old English weard ‘watch’ + hlāw ‘mound, hill’.

variants.name: Wardlow
meanings: English: habitational name from Wardlow in Derbyshire, from Old English weard ‘watch’ + hlāw ‘hill’. Compare Wardlaw .

variants.name: Warden
meanings: English and Scottish: occupational name for a watchman or guard, from Anglo-Norman French wardein, Old French gardein ‘one who keeps guard, a warden’, i.e. a gate-keeper, porter, or sentinel.

English: habitational name from any of various places, for example in Bedfordshire, County Durham, Kent, Northumerland, and Northamptonshire, called Warden, from Old English weard ‘watch’ + dūn ‘hill’. Compare Wardlaw and Wardle 2.

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

en.lifeSummary: When Henry Wardlaw was born in 1410, in Fife, Scotland, his father, Henry Wardlaw, was 11 and his mother, Christian Lauder, was 10. He married Margaret Oliphant co-heiress of Dron. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 5 daughters. He died on 14 July 1475, in Scotland, at the age of 65.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Henry Wardlaw est né en 1410, à Fife, Écosse, son père, Henry Wardlaw, avait 11 ans et sa mère, Christian Lauder, avait 10 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Oliphant co-heiress of Dron. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé le 14 juillet 1475, à Écosse, à l’âge de 65 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Henry Wardlaw 1410 in Fife, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Henry Wardlaw 11 und seine Mutter Christian Lauder 10. Er hat Margaret Oliphant co-heiress of Dron geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb am 14. Juli 1475 im Alter von 65 Jahren in Scotland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Henry Wardlaw è nato il nel 1410 nel Fife, Scotland, il suo padre, Henry Wardlaw, aveva 11 anni e il suo madre, Christian Lauder, aveva 10 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Oliphant co-heiress of Dron. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 14 luglio 1475, nel Scotland, all'età di 65 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Henry Wardlaw(이)가 1410년 스컷랜드 피프에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Henry Wardlaw(은)는 11세였고, 그의 어머니 Christian Lauder(은)는 10세였다. 그는 Margaret Oliphant co-heiress of Dron(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1475년 7월 14일 스컷랜드에서 65세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Henry Wardlaw nasceu em 1410, em Fife, Scotland, seu pai, Henry Wardlaw, tinha 11 anos e sua mãe, Christian Lauder, tinha 10 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Oliphant co-heiress of Dron. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em 14 de julho de 1475, em Scotland, com 65 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Henry Wardlaw родился в 1410 г. в местности фиф, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Henry Wardlaw было 11 лет, а матери, которую звали Christian Lauder, 10. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Oliphant co-heiress of Dron. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Он умер 14 июля 1475 г. в местности Шотландия в возрасте 65 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Henry Wardlaw nació en 1410, en Fife, Scotland, su papá, Henry Wardlaw, tenía 11 años y su mamá, Christian Lauder, tenía 10 años. Se casó con Margaret Oliphant co-heiress of Dron. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 14 de julio de 1475, en Scotland, a la edad de 65 años.
